India.title: Voter Registration Deadline
India.message: Last date to register is March 30. Ensure your name is in the voter list.

India.title: Electoral Bond Update
India.message: New transparency guidelines issued for electoral contributions.

Bhopal.title: Polling Booth Update
Bhopal.message: Booth #23 moved to Govt School near Arera Colony.

Bhopal.title: Local Candidate List
Bhopal.message: Final candidate list for Bhopal constituency is now available at the ECI portal.

Delhi.title: Special Identity Drive
Delhi.message: Visit your local SDM office for Voter ID corrections this weekend.

Mumbai.title: Youth Voting Campaign
Mumbai.message: Join the 'Mumbai Votes' rally at Marine Drive this Sunday.
